title: statice neglecta
intro: Statice neglecta, also known as desert statice or ice plant, is a succulent perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and vibrant pink or white flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Statice neglecta include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially aiding in the treatment of conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Statice neglecta can be used in herbal preparations, such as salves, creams, and infusions, which are often applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
